request.description:
QUERY PARAMS

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Accepted**|**Default**
|---|---|---|---|---|---
| id             |            | Array of Number or Number | Search by id                                                                                       |                 |
| exclude_id     |            | Array of Number of Number | Search omit id                                                                                     |                 |
| order_by       |            | String                    | Define sort. Format: {columnName-direction(asc/desc)}. Ex: `last_name-asc`                         |                 |created_at-desc
| limit          |            | Number                    | Define number of record per page.                                                                  |                 |20
| page           |            | Number                    | Define page to query                                                           | | 1
|request_id | |String|Search by request id
|user| |Number|Search by user id
|payment_method| |String|Search by payment method
|start_date| |String|Search by start date| YYYY/MM/DD
|end_date| |String|Search by end date| YYYY/MM/DD
|order_type| |String|Search by order type
|ship_method| |String| Search by ship method
|ship_status| |String| Search by ship status
|receiver_name| |String|Search by receiver name
|order_code| |String|
|receiver_phone| |String|
|receiver_city_id| |Number|
|receiver_district_id| |Number|
|receiver_address| |String|
|shipper_id| |Number|
|warehouse_id| |Number|
|user_created_id| |Number|
|user_confirmed_id| |Number|
|user_ready_id| |Number|
|completed_at_bottom| |Number| Option to set order for completed order, `1` will make the completed ones be placed at the bottom and `0` vice versa | 1, 0
|status|*|String/String[]|Set `all` to get all order. Missing make it be Not Found

QUERY PARAMS

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**|
|---|---|---|---|---
| id             |            | Array of Number or Number | Search by id                                                                                       |                 |
| exclude_id     |            | Array of Number of Number | Search omit id                                                                                     |                 |
| order_by       |            | String                    | Define sort. Format: {columnName-direction(asc/desc)}. Ex: `created_at-desc`                         |     created_at-desc            |
| limit          |            | Number                    | Define number of record per page.                                                                  |     10            |
| page           |            | Number                    | Define page to query                                                                               |      1           |
|user_id| |Number |Search by log creator's Id|
|date_from| |String |Search from date. Format `YYYY-MM-DD`|
|date_to| |String |Search to date. Format `YYYY-MM-DD`|

QUERY PARAMS

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default**
|---|---|---|---|---
| id| | Array of Number or Number | Search by id|
| order_by | | String| Define sort. Format: {columnName-direction(asc/desc)}. Ex: `created_at-desc` | created_at-desc
| limit | | Number| Define number of record per page. | 20
| page| | Number| Define page to query |1
| date_from | | String| Search from Date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD|
| date_to | | String| Search to Date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD |
| status |*|Array of String or String|Search by status. `all`, `confirmed`, `exported`, `imported`, `trash`|
|user_id| |Number|Id of User|
|parent_id| |Number|Id of parent|
|ticket_type| |Array of String or String|Type of Ticket: `expected-produced`, `actual-produced`, `import`, `export`|

request.description:
QUERY PARAMS

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default**
|---|---|---|---|---
| order_by  | | String   | Define sort. Format: {columnName-direction(asc/desc)}. Ex: `created_at-desc`  |      created_at-desc
| limit     | | Number   | Define number of record per page. |      10
| page      | | Number   | Define page to query  |      1
|date_start| |String| Format: YYYY-MM-DD
|date_end| |String| Format: YYYY-MM-DD
|product_id| |Number|Search by product id
|product_code| |String|Search by product code
|ticket_id| |Number|Id of Ticket

request.description:
BODY --- |**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default** |---|---|---|---|--- |ticket_comment| |String|Describe ticket| |status|*|String|Status of ticket: `exported`, `imported`, `confirmed`| |ticket_type|*|String|Type of Ticket: `expected-produced`, `actual-produced`, `import`, `export`| |items|*|Array of Object
  • product_id: String
  • quantity: Number
| Detail of product| |parent_id| |Number|Id of `expected-produced` Ticket. This is required for the Ticket has type that is omit `expected-produced`|

query.description: 1 hoặc ko truyền gì hết, truyền 1 là trả về tất cả dữ liệu

request.description:
BODY

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**
|---|---|---|---
|user_id|*|Number|Owner of Token
|token|*|String|Instance Id get from Firebase
|user_type|*|String|This will be used as topic name
|notify_enabled|*|Number| 1 or 0, 1 will enable notify

BODY

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**
|---|---|---|---
|token|*|String|Token to update
|subscribed_topics| |Array of String|Topic name to subscribe
|notify_enabled| |Number| 1 or 0, 1 will enable notify

BODY

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**
|---|---|---|---
|token|*|String|Instance ID
|topics|*|Array of String|Array of topic will subscribe to

BODY

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**
|---|---|---|---
|token|*|String|Instance ID
|topics|*|Array of String|Array of topic will unsubscribe from
